channel.title: BillingWebhookKit Guides
channel.description: Payment webhook testing guides for Lemon Squeezy, signatures, cURL replay, idempotency, and CI.

item.title: BillingWebhookKit Free Sample
item.description: Download a free sample with a Lemon Squeezy fixture, Next.js handler, Vitest signature test, and GitHub Actions workflow.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Webhook Fixtures
item.description: Copy-ready Lemon Squeezy webhook fixtures for order, subscription, license, cancellation, and payment success tests.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Webhook Idempotency
item.description: Make Lemon Squeezy webhook handlers safe against retries, duplicate deliveries, and repeated billing side effects.

item.title: Webhook Idempotency Key Generator
item.description: Generate stable payment webhook idempotency keys, unique constraints, and process-once handler guards for provider retries.

item.title: Payment Webhook Test Generator
item.description: Generate payment webhook payloads, signatures, cURL replay commands, and framework handler examples for SaaS billing tests.

item.title: BillingWebhookKit Pro Preview
item.description: Preview the CN¥69 digital pack: payment webhook fixtures, handlers, tests, CI workflow, and launch checklist.

item.title: Test Lemon Squeezy Webhooks Locally
item.description: Generate Lemon Squeezy webhook payloads, HMAC signatures, and cURL replay commands without sending secrets to a server.

item.title: Webhook Signature Mismatch Debugger
item.description: Debug payment webhook signature mismatches caused by raw-body changes, wrong secrets, header formats, framework parsers, and cURL replay mistakes.

item.title: Payment Webhook CI Tests
item.description: A practical CI checklist for testing payment webhook signatures, fixtures, retries, and idempotency.

item.title: Billing Webhook Launch Readiness Checklist
item.description: Score payment webhook launch risk across signature tests, duplicate replay, entitlement decisions, secrets, smoke tests, review artifacts, and monitoring.

item.title: Billing Webhook Cost Calculator
item.description: Estimate the engineering cost of debugging payment webhook signatures, retries, idempotency, and release review.

item.title: Webhook Entitlement Decision Matrix
item.description: Map payment webhook events to SaaS access grants, subscription renewals, license delivery, cancellation scheduling, and quarantine decisions.

item.title: Webhook Idempotency Checklist
item.description: A compact checklist for making payment webhook handlers safe against retries, duplicated events, and out-of-order delivery.

item.title: Webhook Duplicate Replay Test
item.description: Test duplicate payment webhook deliveries with an idempotency key and a process-once Vitest replay check.

item.title: Webhook Review Checklist
item.description: A PR-ready checklist for reviewing payment webhook routes before billing changes ship.
